Cosmic Astrology

MVP v1.0

Preferences

Astrological Framework

Zodiac Calculation

Select whether to calculate positions relative to constellations (Sidereal) or seasonal positions (Tropical).

House Divisions

House Division Method

Select how to divide the horoscope houses. Whole Sign makes the entire sign of Lagna House 1. Equal House aligns House 1 cusp exactly to Lagna degrees.

Visualization Style

Kundli Chart Format

Select the preferred layout to draw the birth chart.

Preferences saved automatically!
